Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

Class FunInterImg

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.PredicatePositionReasoner
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.AbstractManualInference
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.FunInterImg
All Implemented Interfaces:
IReasoner, IVersionedReasoner
public class FunInterImg extends AbstractManualInference implements IVersionedReasoner
Basic implementation for Function Converse inference rule f~(f(E))

    • getReasonerID

      public String getReasonerID()
      Description copied from interface: IReasoner
      Returns the unique id of this reasoner, that is the value of the id field used when registering it to the extension point org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasoners.
      Specified by:
      getReasonerID in interface IReasoner
      Returns:
      the unique id of this reasoner

    • getVersion

      public int getVersion()
      Description copied from interface: IVersionedReasoner
      Returns the current version of this reasoner.

      The version number is incremented whenever the reasoner code changes.

      Specified by:
      getVersion in interface IVersionedReasoner
      Returns:
      a non-negative integer
